# LibRaw 0.21.5 — Vendored for RawView

This directory contains the LibRaw 0.21.5 source code, vendored for the RawView project.

- **Version:** 0.21.5 (final release in 0.21 branch, December 24, 2025)
- **Source:** https://github.com/LibRaw/LibRaw/releases/tag/0.21.5
- **License:** Dual LGPL-2.1 / CDDL-1.0 (see LICENSE.LGPL and LICENSE.CDDL)

The source is compiled from scratch via `build.rs` using the `cc` crate.
No modifications have been made to the LibRaw source code.
